channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is a health risk and safety hazard, 3rd June
item.description:
Tree located on Brookway Road. One of the branches extends over our driveway, resulting in excessive bird droppings covering the entire area, along with continual debris falling from the tree. As we have two young children aged 5 and under, we are increasingly concerned that this presents both a health risk and a safety hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Brookway Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on Highway land

item.title: Uneven surface and pavement deteriorating, 3rd June
item.description:
Outside numbers 3,7 and 9 the pavements have been deteriorating over time and now have dips and grooves starting which could lead to more of the pavement coming up and some concerns over trip hazards. Some residents do not use the paths because of their unevenness and choose to walk on the road - unfortunately with that now becoming a bigger problem and risk both need investigating. The area outside 9 has started around where the internet cabling comes up. The area outside 7 is where the drain cover is and it has created a step by the side of it. The area outside 3 is poor surface quality and starting to deteriorate. This is all combined with the poor general surface condition of the roadway which includes pot holes, cracks etc as reported in the separate report. Thanks very much for your time and consideration on this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Flint Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dip in road and poor surface conditions worsening, 3rd June
item.description:
As a follow on to the more fuller report of the road surface condition please find 3 additional photos of the large dip in the roadway near a drain and the potholes and poor surface conditions leading to that. I have put the majority of issues in the other report but this is quite significant as well and could lead to issues with the drain and water run off etc. thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Flint Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 potholes and damage to road surface continuing to get worse, 3rd June
item.description:
Flint road has been deteriorating with the amount of car traffic it receives. The surface has got a variety of issues ranging from cracks/splits to patchwork repairs and pot holes as well as a large dip/recess. The potholes are quite significant in size and number and are dotted throughout the road but noticeably in front of 3.4.6.9 and the turning circle. Some of the potholes pictured have loose material in and in some cases the edging bricks have come away or been damaged. This loose material gets removed from the holes by passing traffic each day and they get larger. Caernarvon Road was fully resurfaced not too long ago and it would be advantageous to get these problems aligned and resurfaced too to save damage to cars or they get significantly degraded not allowing suitable access. I will also submit a further ticket for the dip in the road. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Flint Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped litter and household items, 3rd June
item.description:
On Waterloo Street litter, fly tipped in corner near Addis street. I imagine people dumping rubbish because swindon road tip is closed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Waterloo Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fast growing weeds obstructing the pavement, 3rd June
item.description:
This is the third year of reporting the same issue! Weeds are very rapidly growing on the right hand side as you head towards Stoke Orchard on Stoke Orchard Road between Lyndley Chase and Farriers Reach. This is narrowing the pavement and could well be poisonous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole not fixed, 3rd June
item.description:
The pothole is as you leave hulbert close turn left and then immediately turn right . The junction has the pothole and it is getting bigger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Church Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights but no work ever being fonet, 3rd June
item.description:
Please can you explain why the temporary traffic lights are still in situ where the car was on fire but no work has ever been done to sweep debris away or repair the road. The lights make journeys along he A46 even more unbearable than we have to endure on a daily basis and the frustration of these lights with no evidence of any work ever done makes it worse. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red ringway sign left by contractors near 23/25 Brookway road, 3rd June
item.description:
Sign left since I think January 2026 Outside 23/25 Brookway road, GL53 8HF. What3words is oven.towns.mash Thanks!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43a, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Damaged tree parts falling on the public footpath, 3rd June
item.description:
10 metres from 31 Honeybourne Drive Cheltenham GL510QJ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Honeybourne Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Road closure signs and barriers blocking the road on the B4634., 3rd June
item.description:
Road closure signs and barriers blocking Old Gloucester Road B4634 from the House In The Tree pub towards Cheltenham saying the road is closed and no through traffic. There is no mention of this on any websites and no notifications that they are there until you hit them. The road is still open and you can get through. The signs are causing a big problem with people turning around in the road blocking traffic heading towards the house in the tree and from Withybridge Lane. They gave been there for two days now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Vehicle has been dumped here in the night a couple of nights ago, 3rd June
item.description:
The vehicle is smashed up and undrivable. The front and rear windscreen is smashed to smithereens. The vehicle is not a regular vehicle round here. Have logged with DVLA and Guinness partnership aswell.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Walk, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous connected potholes, edge of tarmac breaking away., 3rd June
item.description:
Halfway to the golf course clubhouse car park. This section of road has been deteriorating for several weeks now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickfield Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Water running down from Headlands as per pin on map down to The Mill, water is running constantly
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scheduled street clean unsatisfactory, 3rd June
item.description:
Street not cleaned and basements at risk of flooding from blocked road drains

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, St Lukes Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Large amount of tree branch fallen onto public footpath, 3rd June
item.description:

item.title: Dead branch over pavement and road, 3rd June

Danger to pedestrian and motorist

item.title: Drain gulley beneath pavement is blocked., 3rd June
item.description:
Drain under pavement at 20 Albert Street GL50 4HS is filled with mud to the extent that my downpipe is beginning to fill with rubble from bottom up. Photo shows rubble shaken loose from down pipe when kicked loose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Larput Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 3rd June
item.description:
Cw hedge Needs cutting back Approx 25 mtrs length Bus stop to cut through 2 way lights (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd June
item.description:
15db ENWD with road closure CW sinkhole 300x300x70mm temp repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
